# i18n: Estonian + Russian Landing Page + Celebrity Sample Horoscopes

```
task: i18n-landing
created: 2026-03-01
status: not_started
```

## Spec

### Goal

Add Estonian (ET) and Russian (RU) language versions of zodiacid.com as fully separate static HTML pages — SEO-optimized, crawlable, indexable by Google in each language independently. Fix all existing SEO gaps on EN pages (missing meta robots, og:locale, og:site_name, incomplete schemas). Proper `hreflang` annotations, per-language schema.org JSON-LD, per-language OG/meta tags, multi-language sitemap. Generate culturally relevant celebrity sample horoscopes per language. Minimal JS (same as current site — tabs, mobile nav, cookie consent only). All content baked into HTML.

### Why Now (Decision Principles check)

The landing page IS the revenue instrument. Adding RU/ET expands addressable audience to 3 markets. Estonian market has zero competition. Russian-speaking EU diaspora (Germany, Israel, Baltics, Czech Republic) is large. EN site is live — this is a conversion multiplier, not premature infrastructure.

### Hosting

Cloudflare Pages (static). Repo: `zodiacid/zodiacid.com`, remote `cf`. No build step, no server-side logic, no Workers. Deploy: `git push cf main`. Supports `_redirects` and `_headers` files natively.

### Architecture: EN at Root + Language Subdirectories (SEO-first)

**URL structure** (per ZODIACID_SEO_RULES.md v3.0):
- EN = root (`zodiacid.com/*`) — **NO `/en/` prefix**
- RU = subdirectory (`zodiacid.com/ru/*`)
- ET = subdirectory (`zodiacid.com/et/*`)
- Same filenames across all languages
- Trailing slashes in URLs (CF Pages pretty URLs: `pricing.html` serves at `/pricing/`)

```
sites/zodiacid/
├── index.html                          # EN homepage (root = default)
├── pricing.html
├── sample.html
├── about.html
├── faq.html
├── contact.html
├── product-natal.html
├── product-synastry.html
├── product-parenting.html
├── product-redflag.html
├── privacy.html
├── terms.html
├── refund.html
├── 404.html
├── sample-natal-beyonce.html           # existing
├── sample-natal-taylor-swift.html      # NEW
├── sample-natal-freddie-mercury.html   # NEW
├── sample-synastry-lennon-ono.html     # existing
├── sample-parenting-prince-george.html # existing
├── sample-redflag-pitt-jolie.html      # existing
├── ru/                                 # Russian
│   ├── index.html
│   ├── pricing.html
│   ├── sample.html
│   ├── about.html
│   ├── faq.html
│   ├── contact.html
│   ├── product-natal.html
│   ├── product-synastry.html
│   ├── product-parenting.html
│   ├── product-redflag.html
│   ├── privacy.html
│   ├── terms.html
│   ├── refund.html
│   ├── 404.html
│   ├── sample-natal-tsoi.html
│   ├── sample-natal-pugacheva.html
│   └── sample-natal-vysotsky.html
├── et/                                 # Estonian
│   ├── index.html
│   ├── pricing.html
│   ├── sample.html
│   ├── about.html
│   ├── faq.html
│   ├── contact.html
│   ├── product-natal.html
│   ├── product-synastry.html
│   ├── product-parenting.html
│   ├── product-redflag.html
│   ├── privacy.html
│   ├── terms.html
│   ├── refund.html
│   ├── 404.html
│   ├── sample-natal-part.html
│   ├── sample-natal-ots.html
│   └── sample-natal-meri.html
├── css/styles.css                      # Shared (one copy)
├── js/main.js                          # Shared (minimal — tabs, nav, consent)
├── images/                             # Shared assets
├── sitemap.xml                         # Multi-language with hreflang
├── robots.txt
├── _headers                            # Cache + security headers
└── site.webmanifest                    # Referenced, needs verification
```

**Why separate files, not JS switching:**
1. Google indexes each language version independently — RU pages rank in Russian Google, ET pages in Estonian Google
2. Each page has its own `<html lang="ru">`, `<title>`, `<meta description>`, OG tags, schema.org — all in the correct language
3. Zero JS needed for content — pages load instantly, no flash of wrong language
4. Social sharing works: sharing `/ru/` shows Russian OG title/description in Telegram/VK
5. `hreflang` tells Google these are translations of each other — no duplicate content penalty
6. CF Pages serves them as plain static files — perfect cache, perfect performance

**Why EN at root, not /en/:**
1. Existing indexed URLs stay valid — zero redirect complexity, zero SEO risk
2. EN is x-default — root is the canonical location per Google's hreflang spec
3. Simpler architecture — only RU/ET need subdirectories
4. All existing bookmarks, backlinks, and Google index entries keep working

### Scope

**EN pages (19 in sitemap, 20 total):**
- Main: index, pricing, sample, about, faq, contact (6)
- Products: product-natal, product-synastry, product-parenting, product-redflag (4)
- Legal: privacy, terms, refund (3)
- Samples: 3 natal (Beyonce existing + Taylor Swift NEW + Freddie Mercury NEW), 1 synastry (Lennon-Ono), 1 parenting (Prince George), 1 red flag (Pitt-Jolie) (6)
- Error: 404 (1, noindex — not in sitemap)

**RU pages (16 in sitemap, 17 total):**
- Same 14 content pages as EN (translated)
- 3 celebrity natal samples (Tsoi, Pugacheva, Vysotsky)
- 404 (noindex)

**ET pages (16 in sitemap, 17 total):**
- Same 14 content pages as EN (translated)
- 3 celebrity natal samples (Part, Ots, Meri)
- 404 (noindex)

**Totals:** 51 URLs in sitemap (19 EN + 16 RU + 16 ET). 54 HTML files on disk.

**Shared assets (one copy, all languages link to same):** css/styles.css, js/main.js, images/*

**New/updated infrastructure:** sitemap.xml (rewrite with hreflang), _headers (create), robots.txt (update), site.webmanifest (verify)

### Content Decisions

| Decision | Choice | Rationale |
|----------|--------|-----------|
| Sample word count | 400-600 words per celebrity excerpt on sample.html; full reports as separate HTML pages | Matches existing format |
| Sample display | Tab/card selector (existing pattern on sample.html) | Clean UX, existing JS handles tabs |
| Celebrity selection | Culturally specific per language | RU/ET visitors need familiar faces |
| Astrological accuracy | Full verification from Wikipedia birth data | Astrology-literate visitors will catch errors |
| Estonian register | Informal "sina" throughout | Matches personal astrology tone |
| Birth times | Prefer documented; noon chart with disclosure if unavailable | Standard astrology practice |
| Language switcher | Plain `<a>` links with `hreflang`/`lang`/`aria-label` attrs (no flags, no JS) | SEO-crawlable, politically neutral, accessible |
| Internal links | All links within a language version stay in that language (`/ru/pricing/` links to `/ru/product-natal/`) | User stays in their language |
| Price format | "EUR 34.90" consistent across all languages | EUR universal, no locale-specific currency symbols |
| Date formats | EN "December 13, 1989" / RU "13 декабря 1989" / ET "13. detsember 1989" | Native conventions per language |

### Celebrity Candidates

**English (keep existing Beyonce + add 2):**
- Beyonce (existing full report) — Sep 4 1981, Houston TX, birth time documented
- Taylor Swift — Dec 13 1989, West Reading PA, birth time documented
- Freddie Mercury — Sep 5 1946, Stone Town Zanzibar, birth time documented
- Lady Gaga — Mar 28 1986, New York, birth time documented (backup)

**Russian (3):**
- Виктор Цой — Jun 21 1962, Leningrad, birth time documented
- Алла Пугачёва — Apr 15 1949, Moscow, birth time may be available
- Владимир Высоцкий — Jan 25 1938, Moscow, birth time documented
- Земфира — Aug 26 1976, Ufa (backup)
- Булгаков — May 15 1891, Kyiv (backup)

**Estonian (3):**
- Arvo Part — Sep 11 1935, Paide, birth time uncertain (noon chart)
- Georg Ots — Mar 21 1920, Petrograd, birth time uncertain (noon chart)
- Lennart Meri — Mar 29 1929, Tallinn, birth time may be available
- Ott Tanak — Oct 15 1987, Karnku (backup)
- Kersti Kaljulaid — Dec 30 1969, Tartu (backup)

### Translation Quality Requirements

- **RU:** Native-level. "Солнце в Стрельце" not "Солнце в знаке Стрелец". Proper name declension. No Google Translate.
- **ET:** Native-level. Informal "sina". Estonian astrology terms. Date format: "11. september 1935".
- **EN:** Existing copy stays. Professional but warm.

### Zodiac Sign Reference

| EN | RU | ET |
|----|----|----|
| Aries | Овен | Jaar |
| Taurus | Телец | Sonn |
| Gemini | Близнецы | Kaksikud |
| Cancer | Рак | Vahk |
| Leo | Лев | Lovi |
| Virgo | Дева | Neitsi |
| Libra | Весы | Kaalud |
| Scorpio | Скорпион | Skorpion |
| Sagittarius | Стрелец | Ambur |
| Capricorn | Козерог | Kaljukits |
| Aquarius | Водолей | Vesimees |
| Pisces | Рыбы | Kalad |

### SEO Specification

Full SEO rules from ZODIACID_SEO_RULES.md v3.0 (2026-03-01). All Wikidata IDs verified same date.

#### 0. Current State Audit

##### 0.1 Page Inventory (18 HTML files)

| Page | URL | Schema Present | Schema Missing |
|------|-----|----------------|----------------|
| Homepage | `/` (index.html) | WebSite, Organization, FAQPage (8 Qs) | — |
| Pricing | `/pricing/` | OfferCatalog (3 products), BreadcrumbList | — |
| Product: Natal | `/product-natal/` | Product, FAQPage (4 Qs), BreadcrumbList | image, inLanguage |
| Product: Synastry | `/product-synastry/` | Product, FAQPage (3 Qs), BreadcrumbList | image, inLanguage |
| Product: Parenting | `/product-parenting/` | Product, BreadcrumbList | **FAQPage** (page has 3 visible FAQ Qs but no schema), image, inLanguage |
| Product: Red Flag | `/product-redflag/` | Product, BreadcrumbList | **FAQPage** (page has 3 visible FAQ Qs but no schema), image, inLanguage |
| Samples Hub | `/sample/` | ItemList (3 items), BreadcrumbList | 4th item (Red Flag) missing from ItemList |
| Sample: Beyonce | `/sample-natal-beyonce/` | Article (minimal), BreadcrumbList | datePublished, inLanguage, about, image, publisher.logo |
| Sample: Lennon-Ono | `/sample-synastry-lennon-ono/` | Article (minimal), BreadcrumbList | datePublished, inLanguage, about, image, publisher.logo |
| Sample: Pitt-Jolie | `/sample-redflag-pitt-jolie/` | Article (minimal), BreadcrumbList | datePublished, inLanguage, about, image, publisher.logo |
| Sample: Prince George | `/sample-parenting-prince-george/` | Article (minimal), BreadcrumbList | datePublished, inLanguage, about, image, publisher.logo |
| About | `/about/` | AboutPage, BreadcrumbList | — |
| FAQ | `/faq/` | FAQPage (16 Qs), BreadcrumbList | — |
| Contact | `/contact/` | BreadcrumbList | ContactPage schema |
| Privacy | `/privacy/` | BreadcrumbList | — |
| Terms | `/terms/` | BreadcrumbList | — |
| Refund | `/refund/` | BreadcrumbList | — |
| 404 | `/404.html` | BreadcrumbList | Should have NO schema; remove BreadcrumbList |

##### 0.2 Sitewide Missing Elements

Every page is currently missing:
- `<meta name="robots" content="...">`
- `<meta property="og:locale" content="...">`
- `<meta property="og:site_name" content="ZodiacID">`
- Product-specific OG images (all pages share `images/og-image.png`)

##### 0.3 Infrastructure Files

| File | Exists | Issues |
|------|--------|--------|
| `robots.txt` | Yes | Missing `Disallow: /api/` |
| `sitemap.xml` | Yes | Missing hreflang, missing product-redflag/, missing sample-redflag-pitt-jolie/ |
| `_headers` | **No** | Needed for security headers + cache control |
| `_redirects` | **No** | Not needed currently |
| `site.webmanifest` | Referenced | Not verified |

##### 0.4 Known Content Inconsistencies

- `about/` visible text says "Founded by Sergei Tkatshenko" but schema says `founder.name: "Vadik Iljin"` — **Sergei Tkatshenko is authoritative**, remove Vadik Iljin from schema
- Product pages use `Brand` type for brand — should be `Organization` for richer data
- 404.html has canonical URL and BreadcrumbList — should have neither

#### 1. Critical Defaults (every page)

##### 1.1 Meta Robots

```html
<!-- PUBLIC pages -->
<meta name="robots" content="index, follow, max-snippet:-1, max-image-preview:large, max-video-preview:-1">

<!-- NOINDEX pages (404, future checkout/thank-you) -->
<meta name="robots" content="noindex, nofollow">
```

- `max-snippet:-1` — unlimited text extraction for AI Overviews and featured snippets
- `max-image-preview:large` — large image previews in Discover and image search
- 404.html MUST be noindex

##### 1.2 Canonical URLs

Self-referencing canonical on every page. Always HTTPS, never include query params.

```html
<link rel="canonical" href="https://zodiacid.com/pricing/">
```

- EN pages: `https://zodiacid.com/{page}/`
- RU pages: `https://zodiacid.com/ru/{page}/`
- ET pages: `https://zodiacid.com/et/{page}/`
- Homepage: `https://zodiacid.com/` | `https://zodiacid.com/ru/` | `https://zodiacid.com/et/`
- 404.html: NO canonical (it's an error page)

##### 1.3 Hreflang Tags

All 3 language versions present on every page, including self-reference. EN = x-default.

```html
<!-- On zodiacid.com/pricing/ -->
<link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://zodiacid.com/pricing/">
<link rel="alternate" hreflang="ru" href="https://zodiacid.com/ru/pricing/">
<link rel="alternate" hreflang="et" href="https://zodiacid.com/et/pricing/">
<link rel="alternate" hreflang="x-default" href="https://zodiacid.com/pricing/">

<!-- On zodiacid.com/ru/pricing/ — SAME set, identical URLs -->
<link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://zodiacid.com/pricing/">
<link rel="alternate" hreflang="ru" href="https://zodiacid.com/ru/pricing/">
<link rel="alternate" hreflang="et" href="https://zodiacid.com/et/pricing/">
<link rel="alternate" hreflang="x-default" href="https://zodiacid.com/pricing/">
```

Rules:
- Bidirectional (if A points to B, B must point back to A)
- x-default = EN at root
- ISO 639-1 codes only: `en`, `ru`, `et` (no region codes like `en-US`)
- Every page in every language has ALL hreflang tags including self
- 404.html: NO hreflang tags

##### 1.4 HTML Lang Attribute

```html
<html lang="en">   <!-- Root EN pages -->
<html lang="ru">   <!-- /ru/ pages -->
<html lang="et">   <!-- /et/ pages -->
```

##### 1.5 Charset and Viewport

```html
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
```

UTF-8 is critical for Estonian (a, o, u, o) and Russian (Cyrillic).

#### 2. Title Tags and Meta Descriptions

##### 2.1 Title Tag Rules

- Max 60 characters (Google truncates after ~60)
- Primary keyword near the beginning
- Brand at end: `| ZodiacID` or `— ... | ZodiacID`
- Every title unique across entire site (including across languages)

**Current Page Titles (EN):**

| Page | Title |
|------|-------|
| Home | `ZodiacID — Your Personal Astrological Portrait` |
| Pricing | `Reports & Pricing | ZodiacID` |
| Natal | `Your User Manual — Personal Birth Chart Report | EUR 34.90 | ZodiacID` |
| Synastry | `Relationship X-Ray — Compatibility Report | EUR 24.90 | ZodiacID` |
| Parenting | `Parenting Guide — Child's Birth Chart Report | EUR 24.90 | ZodiacID` |
| Red Flag | `Red Flag Check — Relationship Friction Analysis | EUR 3.90 | ZodiacID` |
| Samples | `Sample Reports | ZodiacID` |
| Sample: Beyonce | `Beyonce Birth Chart Analysis — Sample Natal Report | ZodiacID` |
| Sample: Lennon-Ono | `Lennon & Ono Compatibility — Sample Synastry Report | ZodiacID` |
| Sample: Pitt-Jolie | `Pitt & Jolie Red Flag Check — Sample Relationship Report | ZodiacID` |
| Sample: George | `Prince George Parenting Guide — Sample Child Report | ZodiacID` |
| About | `About ZodiacID` |
| FAQ | `Frequently Asked Questions | ZodiacID` |
| Contact | `Contact ZodiacID — Tallinn, Estonia` |
| Privacy | `Privacy Policy — ZodiacID` |
| Terms | `Terms of Service — ZodiacID` |
| Refund | `Refund Policy — ZodiacID` |
| 404 | `Page Not Found — ZodiacID` |

**RU/ET Title Formulas:**

| Page | RU | ET |
|------|----|-----|
| Home | `ZodiacID — Ваш Персональный Астрологический Портрет` | `ZodiacID — Sinu Isiklik Astroloogiline Portree` |
| Pricing | `Отчёты и цены \| ZodiacID` | `Raportid ja hinnad \| ZodiacID` |
| Natal | `Ваше Руководство — Натальный Отчёт \| EUR 34.90 \| ZodiacID` | `Sinu Kasiraamat — Sunnikaardi Raport \| EUR 34.90 \| ZodiacID` |
| Synastry | `Рентген Отношений — Совместимость \| EUR 24.90 \| ZodiacID` | `Suhte Rontgen — Sobivusraport \| EUR 24.90 \| ZodiacID` |
| Parenting | `Для Родителей — Натальная Карта Ребёнка \| EUR 24.90 \| ZodiacID` | `Lapsevanema Juhend — Lapse Sunnikaart \| EUR 24.90 \| ZodiacID` |
| Red Flag | `Проверка на Red Flag — Анализ Трений \| EUR 3.90 \| ZodiacID` | `Red Flag Kontroll — Suhte Erinevuste Analuus \| EUR 3.90 \| ZodiacID` |
| FAQ | `Вопросы и ответы \| ZodiacID` | `Kusimused ja vastused \| ZodiacID` |
| About | `О ZodiacID` | `ZodiacID-st` |
| Contact | `Контакты \| ZodiacID` | `Kontakt \| ZodiacID` |
| Samples | `Примеры отчётов \| ZodiacID` | `Naidisraportid \| ZodiacID` |
| Privacy | `Политика конфиденциальности — ZodiacID` | `Privaatsuspoliitika — ZodiacID` |
| Terms | `Условия использования — ZodiacID` | `Kasutustingimused — ZodiacID` |
| Refund | `Политика возврата — ZodiacID` | `Tagastuspoliitika — ZodiacID` |
| 404 | `Страница не найдена — ZodiacID` | `Lehte ei leitud — ZodiacID` |

**Future Content Hub Titles:**

| Type | Formula | Example |
|------|---------|---------|
| Sign Hub | `{Sign}: Complete Zodiac Guide — Traits, Dates & Compatibility` | `Aries: Complete Zodiac Guide — Traits, Dates & Compatibility` |
| Birthday | `{Month} {Day} Zodiac Sign: {Sign} Personality & Traits` | `March 14 Zodiac Sign: Pisces Personality & Traits` |
| Compatibility | `{Sign1} and {Sign2} Compatibility: Love & Relationship` | `Aries and Leo Compatibility: Love & Relationship` |

##### 2.2 Meta Description Rules

150-160 characters. Include value proposition or CTA. Unique per page per language.

| Page | EN Description |
|------|---------------|
| Home | `40+ page personality report based on your exact birth data. 20 celestial bodies, 50+ aspects, Swiss Ephemeris precision. Get your astrological user manual.` |
| Pricing | `Choose your astrological report: User Manual (EUR 34.90), Relationship X-Ray (EUR 24.90), or Parenting Guide (EUR 24.90). Delivered within 24 hours.` |
| Natal | `40+ page natal chart report covering personality, emotions, love, career and 9 more life areas. Based on 20 celestial bodies at your exact birth time. EUR 34.90.` |
| Synastry | `Full zodiac compatibility report for two birth charts. Love chemistry, communication, conflict triggers, growth areas. EUR 24.90.` |
| Parenting | `Understand your child through their birth chart. Emotional needs, learning style, natural talents, challenges. Written for parents. EUR 24.90.` |
| Red Flag | `Top 5 reasons you'll fight, plus survival scripts. Brutally honest relationship friction analysis. EUR 3.90.` |
| Samples | `Read real ZodiacID reports generated for celebrities. See the depth and precision before you order your own.` |
| FAQ | `Answers to common questions about ZodiacID reports: what you get, how it works, birth time requirements, delivery, and refunds.` |

RU/ET descriptions: write natively per language — NOT translations.

#### 3. Schema Markup (JSON-LD)

##### 3.1 Schema Status (as of March 2026)

**Rich results fully supported:**
- Product + Offer (product pages) — stars, price, availability in SERPs
- BreadcrumbList (all pages) — breadcrumb trail in SERPs
- Organization (sitewide) — Knowledge Panel, brand entity
- WebSite (homepage) — sitelinks
- Article (content pages) — date, author, headline in SERPs

**Restricted but still useful for AI Overviews:**
- FAQPage — rich results restricted to authoritative govt/health sites since Aug 2023. Still useful for AI systems and Google's internal understanding. Keep using it.
- HowTo — visual rich results removed Sept 2023. Don't add new ones.

**Do NOT use until criteria met:**
- AggregateRating — requires real, verifiable reviews. Fake reviews = Google manual action.
- Review — same as above.

##### 3.2 Homepage Schema (index.html)

**WebSite:**
```json
{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "WebSite",
  "name": "ZodiacID",
  "url": "https://zodiacid.com",
  "description": "In-depth natal chart reports and zodiac compatibility analysis. Birth chart readings covering personality traits, love compatibility, and life patterns.",
  "publisher": {
    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "ZodiacID",
    "url": "https://zodiacid.com"
  },
  "inLanguage": ["en", "ru", "et"]
}
```

No `potentialAction` / `SearchAction` — site has no search functionality.

**Organization:**
```json
{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "Organization",
  "name": "ZodiacID",
  "url": "https://zodiacid.com",
  "logo": "https://zodiacid.com/images/og-image.png",
  "email": "contact@zodiacid.com",
  "description": "Natal chart reports and zodiac compatibility analysis based on astronomical calculations from Astrolog 7.80.",
  "founder": {
    "@type": "Person",
    "name": "Sergei Tkatshenko"
  },
  "address": {
    "@type": "PostalAddress",
    "addressLocality": "Tallinn",
    "addressCountry": "EE"
  },
  "contactPoint": {
    "@type": "ContactPoint",
    "email": "contact@zodiacid.com",
    "contactType": "customer service",
    "availableLanguage": ["en", "ru", "et"]
  },
  "sameAs": [
    "https://vadikiljin.substack.com"
  ],
  "knowsAbout": [
    "Natal Chart",
    "Birth Chart",
    "Zodiac Signs",
    "Zodiac Compatibility",
    "Synastry",
    "Astrology"
  ]
}
```

##### 5.4 CF Pages Headers (_headers file)

Create `_headers` in site root:

```
/*
  X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff
  Referrer-Policy: strict-origin-when-cross-origin
  Permissions-Policy: camera=(), microphone=(), geolocation=()

/css/*
  Cache-Control: public, max-age=31536000, immutable

/js/*
  Cache-Control: public, max-age=31536000, immutable

/images/*
  Cache-Control: public, max-age=31536000, immutable

/*.html
  Cache-Control: public, max-age=3600, must-revalidate

/ru/*.html
  Cache-Control: public, max-age=3600, must-revalidate

/et/*.html
  Cache-Control: public, max-age=3600, must-revalidate
```

##### 5.5 Core Web Vitals

Thresholds:
- LCP (Largest Contentful Paint): < 2.5s
- INP (Interaction to Next Paint): < 200ms
- CLS (Cumulative Layout Shift): < 0.1

Static HTML on CF CDN should pass easily. Watch for:
- Unoptimized images — use WebP + `<picture>` fallback (already done on product pages)
- Render-blocking JS — `defer` non-critical scripts (main.js already deferred on sample pages, not on others)
- Font loading flash — use `font-display: swap` (Google Fonts handles this via `&display=swap`)
- CLS from late-loading elements — always set `width` and `height` on images

```html
<!-- Above fold: eager, high priority -->
<img src="hero.webp" alt="..." width="800" height="450" loading="eager" fetchpriority="high">

<!-- Below fold: lazy -->
<img src="chart.webp" alt="..." width="600" height="400" loading="lazy">
```

##### 5.6 Internal Linking

Within a language version, ALL internal links stay in that language:
- `/ru/pricing/` links to `/ru/product-natal/` (never to `/product-natal/`)
- Root EN pages link to other root pages (no prefix)
- Language switcher is the ONLY cross-language link

Language switcher — plain `<a>` tags, no JS:
```html
<!-- On /ru/pricing/ -->
<nav class="lang-switcher" aria-label="Language">
  <a href="/pricing/" hreflang="en" lang="en">English</a>
  <span class="active" aria-current="true">Русский</span>
  <a href="/et/pricing/" hreflang="et" lang="et">Eesti</a>
</nav>

<!-- On /pricing/ (EN root) -->
<nav class="lang-switcher" aria-label="Language">
  <span class="active" aria-current="true">English</span>
  <a href="/ru/pricing/" hreflang="ru" lang="ru">Русский</a>
  <a href="/et/pricing/" hreflang="et" lang="et">Eesti</a>
</nav>
```

#### 6. Content SEO

##### 6.1 Heading Hierarchy

One H1 per page. No skipping levels.

```
H1: Primary keyword (one per page)
  H2: Major sections
    H3: Subsections
```

##### 6.2 Image SEO

```html
<!-- Good: descriptive, specific -->
<img alt="Beyonce natal chart wheel showing Virgo Sun and Scorpio Moon">
<img alt="Brad Pitt and Angelina Jolie synastry biwheel — Sagittarius Sun and Gemini Sun relationship chart">

<!-- Bad: keyword stuffed -->
<img alt="chart image zodiac astrology horoscope natal">

<!-- Decorative only -->
<img alt="" aria-hidden="true">
```

All images MUST have `alt`, `width`, `height` attributes.
Use `aria-hidden="true"` for purely decorative images (like the 404 background wheel).

##### 6.3 Content Freshness

- `datePublished` in Article schema: set once, never change
- `dateModified`: update when content meaningfully changes
- `lastmod` in sitemap: actual last modification date

##### 6.4 AI Overview Optimization

1. Clear, direct opening sentences answering the query. No preamble.
2. Semantic HTML (H2/H3 matching common search queries).
3. Specific data: planetary positions, degree numbers, exact counts (20 celestial bodies, 50+ aspects).
4. `sameAs` Wikidata links in schema — helps AI disambiguate entities.
5. Short paragraphs (2-3 sentences). AI extracts paragraph-level chunks.
6. Never mention "AI" in public content or meta tags.

##### 6.5 Entertainment Disclaimer

Every page footer currently has: "For entertainment and self-reflection purposes only. Not a substitute for professional, medical, legal, or financial advice."

This MUST be present on every page across all languages. Translate natively for RU/ET.

- Same filenames across all languages
- Each language is a complete, standalone set of HTML files

##### 8.2 Per-Language Content Rules

- ALL visible text in page language — zero mixing
- RU/ET content is written natively, NOT translated from English
- Brand name "ZodiacID" stays in Latin everywhere
- Prices always in EUR with "EUR" prefix (not $ or the euro sign in different formats)

##### 8.3 Per-Language Schema Rules

- Every JSON-LD block must have `"inLanguage": "{lang}"` where applicable
- All text fields (name, description, question, answer) in page language
- URLs point to the language-specific page
- `sameAs` Wikidata links stay identical (language-neutral)
- BreadcrumbList: translate `name` values, use localized URLs

##### 8.4 Per-Language Meta Rules

- `<html lang="{lang}">` matches content language
- `<title>` in page language
- `<meta name="description">` in page language
- All OG title/description in page language
- `og:locale` matches: `en_US`, `ru_RU`, `et_EE`
- `og:url` points to the localized URL

#### 9. SEO Validation Checklist

##### Pre-Launch (every new page or language version)

**Structure:**
- [ ] Unique `<title>` (no duplicates across entire site including all languages)
- [ ] Unique `<meta name="description">`
- [ ] Self-referencing `<link rel="canonical">`
- [ ] `<meta name="robots">` present
- [ ] Correct `<html lang="">` attribute
- [ ] Semantic H1 > H2 > H3 hierarchy, one H1 per page

**Hreflang:**
- [ ] All 4 hreflang tags present (en, ru, et, x-default)
- [ ] Tags are bidirectional across all 3 language versions
- [ ] x-default points to EN root version
- [ ] URLs in hreflang match actual file paths

**Schema:**
- [ ] JSON-LD validates in Google Rich Results Test
- [ ] Product schema has all fields (price, availability, returnPolicy, deliveryLeadTime)
- [ ] Article schema has datePublished, inLanguage, author, publisher with logo
- [ ] FAQPage schema matches visible FAQ content exactly
- [ ] `inLanguage` present on all content schemas
- [ ] No schema on 404.html

**Open Graph:**
- [ ] og:title, og:description in page language
- [ ] og:image with absolute URL
- [ ] og:url matches canonical
- [ ] og:site_name = "ZodiacID"
- [ ] og:locale matches page language
- [ ] Test: paste URL in Telegram — correct language title/description shown

**Technical:**
- [ ] sitemap.xml includes all public pages with hreflang
- [ ] robots.txt allows crawling of all public pages
- [ ] No mixed content (HTTP on HTTPS)
- [ ] 404.html returns 404 status code (not 200)
- [ ] All images have `alt`, `width`, `height`
- [ ] No orphan pages (every page reachable via internal link)
- [ ] Core Web Vitals pass (PageSpeed Insights)

**I18N:**
- [ ] All internal links within RU pages point to /ru/ paths
- [ ] All internal links within ET pages point to /et/ paths
- [ ] EN internal links use root paths (no prefix)
- [ ] Language switcher links to correct equivalent page
- [ ] No English text visible on RU/ET pages (except brand name)
- [ ] Product prices match across all languages
- [ ] Disclaimer in footer translated for each language

##### Post-Launch (weekly for 4 weeks)

- [ ] Google Search Console: no crawl errors
- [ ] Google Search Console: pages indexed vs submitted per language
- [ ] Google Search Console: no manual actions
- [ ] Hreflang audit (Screaming Frog or Ahrefs)

##### Monthly

- [ ] Schema validation after content updates
- [ ] Dead link check
- [ ] Verify RU/ET pages indexed (`site:zodiacid.com/ru/`, `site:zodiacid.com/et/`)
- [ ] `priceValidUntil` in Product schema not expired

### Risks

1. Bad translations = worse than no translation. Native speakers must QA.
2. Celebrity birth time disputes — some celebs have unverified times.
3. Russian language on EU site may attract sanctioned-jurisdiction traffic. Payment processor handles geo-blocking.
4. 3x maintenance burden — every content change needs 3 files updated.
5. Celebrity samples could be seen as endorsement — use "sample analysis" framing.

### Kill Criteria

1. EN landing page isn't live yet -> ship EN first. (Currently live — proceed.)
2. No validated birth data for 2+ celebrities in any language -> reduce that language's scope.
3. Total site size exceeds CF Pages free tier limits.

------

## Phase 1: Приземление

**Status:** not_started

### Diagnostic Steps

1. Read ALL 18 existing HTML pages — extract every visible text string (headings, body copy, CTAs, labels, placeholders, alt text, aria-labels, title attrs, meta descriptions, OG tags, schema.org text).
2. Read main.js — understand what's there (tabs, mobile nav, cookie consent, GA4). Confirm NO i18n logic needed in JS.
3. Read styles.css — check fixed-width elements that break with longer RU text (Russian runs 20-30% longer than English).
4. Check sample.html tab structure — how tabs work, what content is static HTML.
5. Check sample report HTML files — format, structure, size.
6. Map ALL internal links across all pages (every `<a href=` that points to another site page). EN links must stay at root, RU links use `/ru/`, ET links use `/et/`.
7. Map ALL schema.org JSON-LD blocks across all pages. Cross-reference with SEO Specification section 0.1 (schema present vs missing).
8. Check GA4 setup — pageview tracking will automatically capture `/ru/`, `/et/` paths.
9. Check existing `robots.txt`, `sitemap.xml`, verify `site.webmanifest`.

### Celebrity Data Validation

For each candidate celebrity:
1. Search Wikipedia for birth date, birth time, birth city
2. Record source URL
3. Calculate Sun sign from date

# i18n: Estonian + Russian Landing Page + Celebrity Sample Horoscopes

```
task: i18n-landing
created: 2026-03-01
status: not_started
```

## Spec

### Goal

Add Estonian (ET) and Russian (RU) language versions of zodiacid.com as fully separate static HTML pages — SEO-optimized, crawlable, indexable by Google in each language independently. Fix all existing SEO gaps on EN pages (missing meta robots, og:locale, og:site_name, incomplete schemas). Proper `hreflang` annotations, per-language schema.org JSON-LD, per-language OG/meta tags, multi-language sitemap. Generate culturally relevant celebrity sample horoscopes per language. Minimal JS (same as current site — tabs, mobile nav, cookie consent only). All content baked into HTML.

### Why Now (Decision Principles check)

The landing page IS the revenue instrument. Adding RU/ET expands addressable audience to 3 markets. Estonian market has zero competition. Russian-speaking EU diaspora (Germany, Israel, Baltics, Czech Republic) is large. EN site is live — this is a conversion multiplier, not premature infrastructure.

### Hosting

Cloudflare Pages (static). Repo: `zodiacid/zodiacid.com`, remote `cf`. No build step, no server-side logic, no Workers. Deploy: `git push cf main`. Supports `_redirects` and `_headers` files natively.

### Architecture: EN at Root + Language Subdirectories (SEO-first)

**URL structure** (per ZODIACID_SEO_RULES.md v3.0):
- EN = root (`zodiacid.com/*`) — **NO `/en/` prefix**
- RU = subdirectory (`zodiacid.com/ru/*`)
- ET = subdirectory (`zodiacid.com/et/*`)
- Same filenames across all languages
- Trailing slashes in URLs (CF Pages pretty URLs: `pricing.html` serves at `/pricing/`)

```
sites/zodiacid/
├── index.html                          # EN homepage (root = default)
├── pricing.html
├── sample.html
├── about.html
├── faq.html
├── contact.html
├── product-natal.html
├── product-synastry.html
├── product-parenting.html
├── product-redflag.html
├── privacy.html
├── terms.html
├── refund.html
├── 404.html
├── sample-natal-beyonce.html           # existing
├── sample-natal-taylor-swift.html      # NEW
├── sample-natal-freddie-mercury.html   # NEW
├── sample-synastry-lennon-ono.html     # existing
├── sample-parenting-prince-george.html # existing
├── sample-redflag-pitt-jolie.html      # existing
├── ru/                                 # Russian
│   ├── index.html
│   ├── pricing.html
│   ├── sample.html
│   ├── about.html
│   ├── faq.html
│   ├── contact.html
│   ├── product-natal.html
│   ├── product-synastry.html
│   ├── product-parenting.html
│   ├── product-redflag.html
│   ├── privacy.html
│   ├── terms.html
│   ├── refund.html
│   ├── 404.html
│   ├── sample-natal-tsoi.html
│   ├── sample-natal-pugacheva.html
│   └── sample-natal-vysotsky.html
├── et/                                 # Estonian
│   ├── index.html
│   ├── pricing.html
│   ├── sample.html
│   ├── about.html
│   ├── faq.html
│   ├── contact.html
│   ├── product-natal.html
│   ├── product-synastry.html
│   ├── product-parenting.html
│   ├── product-redflag.html
│   ├── privacy.html
│   ├── terms.html
│   ├── refund.html
│   ├── 404.html
│   ├── sample-natal-part.html
│   ├── sample-natal-ots.html
│   └── sample-natal-meri.html
├── css/styles.css                      # Shared (one copy)
├── js/main.js                          # Shared (minimal — tabs, nav, consent)
├── images/                             # Shared assets
├── sitemap.xml                         # Multi-language with hreflang
├── robots.txt
├── _headers                            # Cache + security headers
└── site.webmanifest                    # Referenced, needs verification
```

**Why separate files, not JS switching:**
1. Google indexes each language version independently — RU pages rank in Russian Google, ET pages in Estonian Google
2. Each page has its own `<html lang="ru">`, `<title>`, `<meta description>`, OG tags, schema.org — all in the correct language
3. Zero JS needed for content — pages load instantly, no flash of wrong language
4. Social sharing works: sharing `/ru/` shows Russian OG title/description in Telegram/VK
5. `hreflang` tells Google these are translations of each other — no duplicate content penalty
6. CF Pages serves them as plain static files — perfect cache, perfect performance

**Why EN at root, not /en/:**
1. Existing indexed URLs stay valid — zero redirect complexity, zero SEO risk
2. EN is x-default — root is the canonical location per Google's hreflang spec
3. Simpler architecture — only RU/ET need subdirectories
4. All existing bookmarks, backlinks, and Google index entries keep working

### Scope

**EN pages (19 in sitemap, 20 total):**
- Main: index, pricing, sample, about, faq, contact (6)
- Products: product-natal, product-synastry, product-parenting, product-redflag (4)
- Legal: privacy, terms, refund (3)
- Samples: 3 natal (Beyonce existing + Taylor Swift NEW + Freddie Mercury NEW), 1 synastry (Lennon-Ono), 1 parenting (Prince George), 1 red flag (Pitt-Jolie) (6)
- Error: 404 (1, noindex — not in sitemap)

**RU pages (16 in sitemap, 17 total):**
- Same 14 content pages as EN (translated)
- 3 celebrity natal samples (Tsoi, Pugacheva, Vysotsky)
- 404 (noindex)

**ET pages (16 in sitemap, 17 total):**
- Same 14 content pages as EN (translated)
- 3 celebrity natal samples (Part, Ots, Meri)
- 404 (noindex)

**Totals:** 51 URLs in sitemap (19 EN + 16 RU + 16 ET). 54 HTML files on disk.

**Shared assets (one copy, all languages link to same):** css/styles.css, js/main.js, images/*

**New/updated infrastructure:** sitemap.xml (rewrite with hreflang), _headers (create), robots.txt (update), site.webmanifest (verify)

### Content Decisions

| Decision | Choice | Rationale |
|----------|--------|-----------|
| Sample word count | 400-600 words per celebrity excerpt on sample.html; full reports as separate HTML pages | Matches existing format |
| Sample display | Tab/card selector (existing pattern on sample.html) | Clean UX, existing JS handles tabs |
| Celebrity selection | Culturally specific per language | RU/ET visitors need familiar faces |
| Astrological accuracy | Full verification from Wikipedia birth data | Astrology-literate visitors will catch errors |
| Estonian register | Informal "sina" throughout | Matches personal astrology tone |
| Birth times | Prefer documented; noon chart with disclosure if unavailable | Standard astrology practice |
| Language switcher | Plain `<a>` links with `hreflang`/`lang`/`aria-label` attrs (no flags, no JS) | SEO-crawlable, politically neutral, accessible |
| Internal links | All links within a language version stay in that language (`/ru/pricing/` links to `/ru/product-natal/`) | User stays in their language |
| Price format | "EUR 34.90" consistent across all languages | EUR universal, no locale-specific currency symbols |
| Date formats | EN "December 13, 1989" / RU "13 декабря 1989" / ET "13. detsember 1989" | Native conventions per language |

### Celebrity Candidates

**English (keep existing Beyonce + add 2):**
- Beyonce (existing full report) — Sep 4 1981, Houston TX, birth time documented
- Taylor Swift — Dec 13 1989, West Reading PA, birth time documented
- Freddie Mercury — Sep 5 1946, Stone Town Zanzibar, birth time documented
- Lady Gaga — Mar 28 1986, New York, birth time documented (backup)

**Russian (3):**
- Виктор Цой — Jun 21 1962, Leningrad, birth time documented
- Алла Пугачёва — Apr 15 1949, Moscow, birth time may be available
- Владимир Высоцкий — Jan 25 1938, Moscow, birth time documented
- Земфира — Aug 26 1976, Ufa (backup)
- Булгаков — May 15 1891, Kyiv (backup)

**Estonian (3):**
- Arvo Part — Sep 11 1935, Paide, birth time uncertain (noon chart)
- Georg Ots — Mar 21 1920, Petrograd, birth time uncertain (noon chart)
- Lennart Meri — Mar 29 1929, Tallinn, birth time may be available
- Ott Tanak — Oct 15 1987, Karnku (backup)
- Kersti Kaljulaid — Dec 30 1969, Tartu (backup)

### Translation Quality Requirements

- **RU:** Native-level. "Солнце в Стрельце" not "Солнце в знаке Стрелец". Proper name declension. No Google Translate.
- **ET:** Native-level. Informal "sina". Estonian astrology terms. Date format: "11. september 1935".
- **EN:** Existing copy stays. Professional but warm.

### Zodiac Sign Reference

| EN | RU | ET |
|----|----|----|
| Aries | Овен | Jaar |
| Taurus | Телец | Sonn |
| Gemini | Близнецы | Kaksikud |
| Cancer | Рак | Vahk |
| Leo | Лев | Lovi |
| Virgo | Дева | Neitsi |
| Libra | Весы | Kaalud |
| Scorpio | Скорпион | Skorpion |
| Sagittarius | Стрелец | Ambur |
| Capricorn | Козерог | Kaljukits |
| Aquarius | Водолей | Vesimees |
| Pisces | Рыбы | Kalad |

### SEO Specification

Full SEO rules from ZODIACID_SEO_RULES.md v3.0 (2026-03-01). All Wikidata IDs verified same date.

200→Full SEO rules from ZODIACID_SEO_RULES.md v3.0 (2026-03-01). All Wikidata IDs verified same date.
   201→
   202→#### 0. Current State Audit
   203→
   204→##### 0.1 Page Inventory (18 HTML files)
   205→
   206→| Page | URL | Schema Present | Schema Missing |
   207→|------|-----|----------------|----------------|
   208→| Homepage | `/` (index.html) | WebSite, Organization, FAQPage (8 Qs) | — |
   209→| Pricing | `/pricing/` | OfferCatalog (3 products), BreadcrumbList | — |
   210→| Product: Natal | `/product-natal/` | Product, FAQPage (4 Qs), BreadcrumbList | image, inLanguage |
   211→| Product: Synastry | `/product-synastry/` | Product, FAQPage (3 Qs), BreadcrumbList | image, inLanguage |
   212→| Product: Parenting | `/product-parenting/` | Product, BreadcrumbList | **FAQPage** (page has 3 visible FAQ Qs but no schema), image, inLanguage |
   213→| Product: Red Flag | `/product-redflag/` | Product, BreadcrumbList | **FAQPage** (page has 3 visible FAQ Qs but no schema), image, inLanguage |
   214→| Samples Hub | `/sample/` | ItemList (3 items), BreadcrumbList | 4th item (Red Flag) missing from ItemList |
   215→| Sample: Beyonce | `/sample-natal-beyonce/` | Article (minimal), BreadcrumbList | datePublished, inLanguage, about, image, publisher.logo |
   216→| Sample: Lennon-Ono | `/sample-synastry-lennon-ono/` | Article (minimal), BreadcrumbList | datePublished, inLanguage, about, image, publisher.logo |
   217→| Sample: Pitt-Jolie | `/sample-redflag-pitt-jolie/` | Article (minimal), BreadcrumbList | datePublished, inLanguage, about, image, publisher.logo |
   218→| Sample: Prince George | `/sample-parenting-prince-george/` | Article (minimal), BreadcrumbList | datePublished, inLanguage, about, image, publisher.logo |
   219→| About | `/about/` | AboutPage, BreadcrumbList | — |
   220→| FAQ | `/faq/` | FAQPage (16 Qs), BreadcrumbList | — |
   221→| Contact | `/contact/` | BreadcrumbList | ContactPage schema |
   222→| Privacy | `/privacy/` | BreadcrumbList | — |
   223→| Terms | `/terms/` | BreadcrumbList | — |
   224→| Refund | `/refund/` | BreadcrumbList | — |
   225→| 404 | `/404.html` | BreadcrumbList | Should have NO schema; remove BreadcrumbList |
   226→
   227→##### 0.2 Sitewide Missing Elements
   228→
   229→Every page is currently missing:
   230→- `<meta name="robots" content="...">`
   231→- `<meta property="og:locale" content="...">`
   232→- `<meta property="og:site_name" content="ZodiacID">`
   233→- Product-specific OG images (all pages share `images/og-image.png`)
   234→
   235→##### 0.3 Infrastructure Files
   236→
   237→| File | Exists | Issues |
   238→|------|--------|--------|
   239→| `robots.txt` | Yes | Missing `Disallow: /api/` |
   240→| `sitemap.xml` | Yes | Missing hreflang, missing product-redflag/, missing sample-redflag-pitt-jolie/ |
   241→| `_headers` | **No** | Needed for security headers + cache control |
   242→| `_redirects` | **No** | Not needed currently |
   243→| `site.webmanifest` | Referenced | Not verified |
   244→
   245→##### 0.4 Known Content Inconsistencies
   246→
   247→- `about/` visible text says "Founded by Sergei Tkatshenko" but schema says `founder.name: "Vadik Iljin"` — **Sergei Tkatshenko is authoritative**, remove Vadik Iljin from schema
   248→- Product pages use `Brand` type for brand — should be `Organization` for richer data
   249→- 404.html has canonical URL and BreadcrumbList — should have neither
   250→
   251→#### 1. Critical Defaults (every page)
   252→
   253→##### 1.1 Meta Robots
   254→
   255→```html
   256→<!-- PUBLIC pages -->
   257→<meta name="robots" content="index, follow, max-snippet:-1, max-image-preview:large, max-video-preview:-1">
   258→
   259→<!-- NOINDEX pages (404, future checkout/thank-you) -->
   260→<meta name="robots" content="noindex, nofollow">
   261→```
   262→
   263→- `max-snippet:-1` — unlimited text extraction for AI Overviews and featured snippets
   264→- `max-image-preview:large` — large image previews in Discover and image search
   265→- 404.html MUST be noindex
   266→
   267→##### 1.2 Canonical URLs
   268→
   269→Self-referencing canonical on every page. Always HTTPS, never include query params.
   270→
   271→```html
   272→<link rel="canonical" href="https://zodiacid.com/pricing/">
   273→```
   274→
   275→- EN pages: `https://zodiacid.com/{page}/`
   276→- RU pages: `https://zodiacid.com/ru/{page}/`
   277→- ET pages: `https://zodiacid.com/et/{page}/`
   278→- Homepage: `https://zodiacid.com/` | `https://zodiacid.com/ru/` | `https://zodiacid.com/et/`
   279→- 404.html: NO canonical (it's an error page)
   280→
   281→##### 1.3 Hreflang Tags
   282→
   283→All 3 language versions present on every page, including self-reference. EN = x-default.
   284→
   285→```html
   286→<!-- On zodiacid.com/pricing/ -->
   287→<link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://zodiacid.com/pricing/">
   288→<link rel="alternate" hreflang="ru" href="https://zodiacid.com/ru/pricing/">
   289→<link rel="alternate" hreflang="et" href="https://zodiacid.com/et/pricing/">
   290→<link rel="alternate" hreflang="x-default" href="https://zodiacid.com/pricing/">
   291→
   292→<!-- On zodiacid.com/ru/pricing/ — SAME set, identical URLs -->
   293→<link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://zodiacid.com/pricing/">
   294→<link rel="alternate" hreflang="ru" href="https://zodiacid.com/ru/pricing/">
   295→<link rel="alternate" hreflang="et" href="https://zodiacid.com/et/pricing/">
   296→<link rel="alternate" hreflang="x-default" href="https://zodiacid.com/pricing/">
   297→```
   298→
   299→Rules:
   300→- Bidirectional (if A points to B, B must point back to A)
   301→- x-default = EN at root
   302→- ISO 639-1 codes only: `en`, `ru`, `et` (no region codes like `en-US`)
   303→- Every page in every language has ALL hreflang tags including self
   304→- 404.html: NO hreflang tags
   305→
   306→##### 1.4 HTML Lang Attribute
   307→
   308→```html
   309→<html lang="en">   <!-- Root EN pages -->
   310→<html lang="ru">   <!-- /ru/ pages -->
   311→<html lang="et">   <!-- /et/ pages -->
   312→```
   313→
   314→##### 1.5 Charset and Viewport
   315→
   316→```html
   317→<meta charset="UTF-8">
   318→<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
   319→```
   320→
   321→UTF-8 is critical for Estonian (a, o, u, o) and Russian (Cyrillic).
   322→
   323→#### 2. Title Tags and Meta Descriptions
   324→
   325→##### 2.1 Title Tag Rules
   326→
   327→- Max 60 characters (Google truncates after ~60)
   328→- Primary keyword near the beginning
   329→- Brand at end: `| ZodiacID` or `— ... | ZodiacID`
   330→- Every title unique across entire site (including across languages)
   331→
   332→**Current Page Titles (EN):**
   333→
   334→| Page | Title |
   335→|------|-------|
   336→| Home | `ZodiacID — Your Personal Astrological Portrait` |
   337→| Pricing | `Reports & Pricing | ZodiacID` |
   338→| Natal | `Your User Manual — Personal Birth Chart Report | EUR 34.90 | ZodiacID` |
   339→| Synastry | `Relationship X-Ray — Compatibility Report | EUR 24.90 | ZodiacID` |
   340→| Parenting | `Parenting Guide — Child's Birth Chart Report | EUR 24.90 | ZodiacID` |
   341→| Red Flag | `Red Flag Check — Relationship Friction Analysis | EUR 3.90 | ZodiacID` |
   342→| Samples | `Sample Reports | ZodiacID` |
   343→| Sample: Beyonce | `Beyonce Birth Chart Analysis — Sample Natal Report | ZodiacID` |

Full SEO rules from ZODIACID_SEO_RULES.md v3.0 (2026-03-01). All Wikidata IDs verified same date.

#### 0. Current State Audit

##### 0.1 Page Inventory (18 HTML files)

| Page | URL | Schema Present | Schema Missing |
|------|-----|----------------|----------------|
| Homepage | `/` (index.html) | WebSite, Organization, FAQPage (8 Qs) | — |
| Pricing | `/pricing/` | OfferCatalog (3 products), BreadcrumbList | — |
| Product: Natal | `/product-natal/` | Product, FAQPage (4 Qs), BreadcrumbList | image, inLanguage |
| Product: Synastry | `/product-synastry/` | Product, FAQPage (3 Qs), BreadcrumbList | image, inLanguage |
| Product: Parenting | `/product-parenting/` | Product, BreadcrumbList | **FAQPage** (page has 3 visible FAQ Qs but no schema), image, inLanguage |
| Product: Red Flag | `/product-redflag/` | Product, BreadcrumbList | **FAQPage** (page has 3 visible FAQ Qs but no schema), image, inLanguage |
| Samples Hub | `/sample/` | ItemList (3 items), BreadcrumbList | 4th item (Red Flag) missing from ItemList |
| Sample: Beyonce | `/sample-natal-beyonce/` | Article (minimal), BreadcrumbList | datePublished, inLanguage, about, image, publisher.logo |
| Sample: Lennon-Ono | `/sample-synastry-lennon-ono/` | Article (minimal), BreadcrumbList | datePublished, inLanguage, about, image, publisher.logo |
| Sample: Pitt-Jolie | `/sample-redflag-pitt-jolie/` | Article (minimal), BreadcrumbList | datePublished, inLanguage, about, image, publisher.logo |
| Sample: Prince George | `/sample-parenting-prince-george/` | Article (minimal), BreadcrumbList | datePublished, inLanguage, about, image, publisher.logo |
| About | `/about/` | AboutPage, BreadcrumbList | — |
| FAQ | `/faq/` | FAQPage (16 Qs), BreadcrumbList | — |
| Contact | `/contact/` | BreadcrumbList | ContactPage schema |
| Privacy | `/privacy/` | BreadcrumbList | — |
| Terms | `/terms/` | BreadcrumbList | — |
| Refund | `/refund/` | BreadcrumbList | — |
| 404 | `/404.html` | BreadcrumbList | Should have NO schema; remove BreadcrumbList |

##### 0.2 Sitewide Missing Elements

Every page is currently missing:
- `<meta name="robots" content="...">`
- `<meta property="og:locale" content="...">`
- `<meta property="og:site_name" content="ZodiacID">`
- Product-specific OG images (all pages share `images/og-image.png`)

##### 0.3 Infrastructure Files

| File | Exists | Issues |
|------|--------|--------|
| `robots.txt` | Yes | Missing `Disallow: /api/` |
| `sitemap.xml` | Yes | Missing hreflang, missing product-redflag/, missing sample-redflag-pitt-jolie/ |
| `_headers` | **No** | Needed for security headers + cache control |
| `_redirects` | **No** | Not needed currently |
| `site.webmanifest` | Referenced | Not verified |

##### 0.4 Known Content Inconsistencies

- `about/` visible text says "Founded by Sergei Tkatshenko" but schema says `founder.name: "Vadik Iljin"` — **Sergei Tkatshenko is authoritative**, remove Vadik Iljin from schema
- Product pages use `Brand` type for brand — should be `Organization` for richer data
- 404.html has canonical URL and BreadcrumbList — should have neither

#### 1. Critical Defaults (every page)

##### 1.1 Meta Robots

```html
<!-- PUBLIC pages -->
<meta name="robots" content="index, follow, max-snippet:-1, max-image-preview:large, max-video-preview:-1">

<!-- NOINDEX pages (404, future checkout/thank-you) -->
<meta name="robots" content="noindex, nofollow">
```

- `max-snippet:-1` — unlimited text extraction for AI Overviews and featured snippets
- `max-image-preview:large` — large image previews in Discover and image search
- 404.html MUST be noindex

##### 1.2 Canonical URLs

Self-referencing canonical on every page. Always HTTPS, never include query params.

```html
<link rel="canonical" href="https://zodiacid.com/pricing/">
```

- EN pages: `https://zodiacid.com/{page}/`
- RU pages: `https://zodiacid.com/ru/{page}/`
- ET pages: `https://zodiacid.com/et/{page}/`
- Homepage: `https://zodiacid.com/` | `https://zodiacid.com/ru/` | `https://zodiacid.com/et/`
- 404.html: NO canonical (it's an error page)

##### 1.3 Hreflang Tags

All 3 language versions present on every page, including self-reference. EN = x-default.

```html
<!-- On zodiacid.com/pricing/ -->
<link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://zodiacid.com/pricing/">
<link rel="alternate" hreflang="ru" href="https://zodiacid.com/ru/pricing/">
<link rel="alternate" hreflang="et" href="https://zodiacid.com/et/pricing/">
<link rel="alternate" hreflang="x-default" href="https://zodiacid.com/pricing/">

<!-- On zodiacid.com/ru/pricing/ — SAME set, identical URLs -->
<link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://zodiacid.com/pricing/">
<link rel="alternate" hreflang="ru" href="https://zodiacid.com/ru/pricing/">
<link rel="alternate" hreflang="et" href="https://zodiacid.com/et/pricing/">
<link rel="alternate" hreflang="x-default" href="https://zodiacid.com/pricing/">
```

Rules:
- Bidirectional (if A points to B, B must point back to A)
- x-default = EN at root
- ISO 639-1 codes only: `en`, `ru`, `et` (no region codes like `en-US`)
- Every page in every language has ALL hreflang tags including self
- 404.html: NO hreflang tags

##### 1.4 HTML Lang Attribute

```html
<html lang="en">   <!-- Root EN pages -->
<html lang="ru">   <!-- /ru/ pages -->
<html lang="et">   <!-- /et/ pages -->
```

##### 1.5 Charset and Viewport

```html
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
```

UTF-8 is critical for Estonian (a, o, u, o) and Russian (Cyrillic).

#### 2. Title Tags and Meta Descriptions

##### 2.1 Title Tag Rules

- Max 60 characters (Google truncates after ~60)
- Primary keyword near the beginning
- Brand at end: `| ZodiacID` or `— ... | ZodiacID`
- Every title unique across entire site (including across languages)

**Do NOT use until criteria met:**
- AggregateRating — requires real, verifiable reviews. Fake reviews = Google manual action.
- Review — same as above.

Not a substitute for professional, medical, legal, or financial advice." This MUST be present on every page across all languages. Translate natively for RU/ET. #### 7. Wikidata Entity References Use `sameAs` in schema to link to Wikidata. Strengthens entity recognition for AI and Knowledge Graph. **All IDs verified against Wikidata API on 2026-03-01.** **Zodiac Signs (Astrological):** | Entity | Q-ID | Verified URL | |--------|------|-------------| | Aries (astrology) | Q32067 | https://www.wikidata.org/wiki/Q32067 | | Taurus (astrology) | Q164016 | https://www.wikidata.org/wiki/Q164016 | | Gemini (astrology) | Q129214 | https://www.wikidata.org/wiki/Q129214 | | Cancer (astrology) | Q161701 | https://www.wikidata.org/wiki/Q161701 | | Leo (astrology) | Q159816 | https://www.wikidata.org/wiki/Q159816 | | Virgo (astrology) | Q134061 | https://www.wikidata.org/wiki/Q134061 | | Libra (astrology) | Q134394 | https://www.wikidata.org/wiki/Q134394 | | Scorpio (astrology) | Q134398 | https://www.wikidata.org/wiki/Q134398 | | Sagittarius (astrology) | Q2194186 | https://www.wikidata.org/wiki/Q2194186 | | Capricorn (astrology) | Q164272 | https://www.wikidata.org/wiki/Q164272 | | Aquarius (astrology) | Q162119 | https://www.wikidata.org/wiki/Q162119 | | Pisces (astrology) | Q1254190 | https://www.wikidata.org/wiki/Q1254190 | **These are astrological signs, NOT constellations.** Constellations have different Q-IDs. **Astrology Concepts:** | Entity | Q-ID | Verified URL | |--------|------|-------------| | Western astrology | Q2266871 | https://www.wikidata.org/wiki/Q2266871 | | Chinese astrology | Q724950 | https://www.wikidata.org/wiki/Q724950 | | Natal chart (horoscope) | Q2643488 | https://www.wikidata.org/wiki/Q2643488 | | Zodiac | Q40540 | https://www.wikidata.org/wiki/Q40540 | | Apparent retrograde motion | Q15354235 | https://www.wikidata.org/wiki/Q15354235 | | Horoscope | Q188518 | https://www.wikidata.org/wiki/Q188518 | Usage: `"sameAs": "https://www.wikidata.org/wiki/Q2643488"` in `about` blocks. #### 8. I18N SEO Rules ##### 8.1 Architecture - EN = root (zodiacid.com/*) - RU = subdirectory (zodiacid.com/ru/*) - ET = subdirectory (zodiacid.com/et/*) - Same filenames across all languages - Each language is a complete, standalone set of HTML files ##### 8.2 Per-Language Content Rules - ALL visible text in page language — zero mixing - RU/ET content is written natively, NOT translated from English - Brand name "ZodiacID" stays in Latin everywhere - Prices always in EUR with "EUR" prefix (not $ or the euro sign in different formats) ##### 8.3 Per-Language Schema Rules - Every JSON-LD block must have `"inLanguage": "{lang}"` where applicable - All text fields (name, description, question, answer) in page language - URLs point to the language-specific page - `sameAs` Wikidata links stay identical (language-neutral) - BreadcrumbList: translate `name` values, use localized URLs ##### 8.4 Per-Language Meta Rules - `` matches content language - `` in page language - `<meta name="description">` in page language - All OG title/description in page language - `og:locale` matches: `en_US`, `ru_RU`, `et_EE` - `og:url` points to the localized URL #### 9. SEO Validation Checklist ##### Pre-Launch (every new page or language version) **Structure:** - [ ] Unique `<title>` (no duplicates across entire site including all languages)

## Phase 2: Стресс-тест

**Status:** not_started **Mandatory: yes**

**Пользователь:**
- Navigate entire site in each language — all internal links stay within language
- EN links stay at root (no `/en/` prefix anywhere)
- RU links all use `/ru/` prefix, ET links all use `/et/` prefix
- Language switcher works on every page, links to correct equivalent page
- Sample page tabs work in all 3 languages, show correct celebrities
- Contact form works in all languages (form submission, labels, placeholders)
- Mobile (320px, 375px, 414px) — RU text doesn't overflow buttons/headings/nav
- Cookie consent shows in correct language
- 404 page shows in correct language, has noindex

**SEO/публичный образ:**
- Every page has correct `<html lang="">` attribute
- Every page has `<meta name="robots">` (noindex only for 404)
- Every page has unique, language-appropriate `<title>` and `<meta name="description">`
- Every page has correct `<link rel="canonical">` (self-referencing, trailing slash)
- Every page has all 4 hreflang links (en, ru, et, x-default) — 404 excepted
- OG tags: `og:locale`, `og:title`, `og:description`, `og:site_name` all correct per language
- Schema.org JSON-LD: `inLanguage` matches page, all text fields in correct language
- `FAQPage` schema on all pages with visible FAQs (index, faq, product-natal, product-synastry, product-parenting, product-redflag)
- `Product` schema complete on all 4 product pages (brand=Organization, image, inLanguage, full Offer)
- `Article` schema complete on all sample pages (datePublished, inLanguage, about, publisher.logo)
- `ContactPage` schema on contact page
- `ItemList` on sample page includes all sample reports
- 404.html: NO schema, NO canonical, NO hreflang
- sitemap.xml validates with 51 URLs, contains all pages with hreflang alternates
- robots.txt allows all crawlers, disallows /api/, points to sitemap
- No duplicate content signals (canonical + hreflang prevent this)
- Google Search Console: submit sitemap, check indexing for all 3 language versions

**Юрист:**
- Celebrity sample horoscopes: "sample analysis" framing, not "X's horoscope"
- No endorsement claims — "Generated as a demonstration using public birth data"
- Sanctions: no geo-blocking needed on static site — payment processor handles it
- Disclaimer text translated accurately in all languages
- Privacy/terms/refund pages fully translated and legally equivalent
- Never mention "AI" in public content or meta tags

**Results:**

------

## Spec

### Goal

Add Estonian (ET) and Russian (RU) language versions of zodiacid.com as fully separate static HTML pages — SEO-optimized, crawlable, indexable by Google in each language independently. Fix all existing SEO gaps on EN pages (missing meta robots, og:locale, og:site_name, incomplete schemas). Proper `hreflang` annotations, per-language schema.org JSON-LD, per-language OG/meta tags, multi-language sitemap. Generate culturally relevant celebrity sample horoscopes per language. Minimal JS (same as current site — tabs, mobile nav, cookie consent only). All content baked into HTML.

### Why Now (Decision Principles check)

The landing page IS the revenue instrument. Adding RU/ET expands addressable audience to 3 markets. Estonian market has zero competition. Russian-speaking EU diaspora (Germany, Israel, Baltics, Czech Republic) is large. EN site is live — this is a conversion multiplier, not premature infrastructure.

### Hosting

Cloudflare Pages (static). Repo: `zodiacid/zodiacid.com`, remote `cf`. No build step, no server-side logic, no Workers. Deploy: `git push cf main`. Supports `_redirects` and `_headers` files natively.

### Architecture: EN at Root + Language Subdirectories (SEO-first)

**URL structure** (per ZODIACID_SEO_RULES.md v3.0):
- EN = root (`zodiacid.com/*`) — **NO `/en/` prefix**
- RU = subdirectory (`zodiacid.com/ru/*`)
- ET = subdirectory (`zodiacid.com/et/*`)
- Same filenames across all languages
- Trailing slashes in URLs (CF Pages pretty URLs: `pricing.html` serves at `/pricing/`)

```
sites/zodiacid/
├── index.html                          # EN homepage (root = default)

**Why separate files, not JS switching:**
1. Google indexes each language version independently — RU pages rank in Russian Google, ET pages in Estonian Google
2. Each page has its own `<html lang="ru">`, `<title>`, `<meta description>`, OG tags, schema.org — all in the correct language
3. Zero JS needed for content — pages load instantly, no flash of wrong language
4. Social sharing works: sharing `/ru/` shows Russian OG title/description in Telegram/VK
5. `hreflang` tells Google these are translations of each other — no duplicate content penalty
6. CF Pages serves them as plain static files — perfect cache, perfect performance

**Why EN at root, not /en/:**
1. Existing indexed URLs stay valid — zero redirect complexity, zero SEO risk
2. EN is x-default — root is the canonical location per Google's hreflang spec
3. Simpler architecture — only RU/ET need subdirectories
4. All existing bookmarks, backlinks, and Google index entries keep working

### Scope

**EN pages (19 in sitemap, 20 total):**
- Main: index, pricing, sample, about, faq, contact (6)

- Error: 404 (1, noindex — not in sitemap)

- 404 (noindex)

**ET pages (16 in sitemap, 17 total):**

**Totals:** 51 URLs in sitemap (19 EN + 16 RU + 16 ET). 54 HTML files on disk.

**Shared assets (one copy, all languages link to same):** css/styles.css, js/main.js, images/*

**New/updated infrastructure:** sitemap.xml (rewrite with hreflang), _headers (create), robots.txt (update), site.webmanifest (verify)

### Content Decisions

| Decision | Choice | Rationale |
|----------|--------|-----------|
| Sample word count | 400-600 words per celebrity excerpt on sample.html; full reports as separate HTML pages | Matches existing format |
| Sample display | Tab/card selector (existing pattern on sample.html) | Clean UX, existing JS handles tabs |
| Celebrity selection | Culturally specific per language | RU/ET visitors need familiar faces |
| Astrological accuracy | Full verification from Wikipedia birth data | Astrology-literate visitors will catch errors |
| Estonian register | Informal "sina" throughout | Matches personal astrology tone |
| Birth times | Prefer documented; noon chart with disclosure if unavailable | Standard astrology practice |
| Language switcher | Plain `<a>` links with `hreflang`/`lang`/`aria-label` attrs (no flags, no JS) | SEO-crawlable, politically neutral, accessible |
| Internal links | All links within a language version stay in that language (`/ru/pricing/` links to `/ru/product-natal/`) | User stays in their language |
| Price format | "EUR 34.90" consistent across all languages | EUR universal, no locale-specific currency symbols |
| Date formats | EN "December 13, 1989" / RU "13 декабря 1989" / ET "13. detsember 1989" | Native conventions per language |

#### 1. Critical Defaults (every page)

##### 1.1 Meta Robots

```html
<!-- PUBLIC pages -->
<meta name="robots" content="index, follow, max-snippet:-1, max-image-preview:large, max-video-preview:-1">

<!-- NOINDEX pages (404, future checkout/thank-you) -->
<meta name="robots" content="noindex, nofollow">
```

- `max-snippet:-1` — unlimited text extraction for AI Overviews and featured snippets
- `max-image-preview:large` — large image previews in Discover and image search
- 404.html MUST be noindex

##### 1.2 Canonical URLs

Self-referencing canonical on every page. Always HTTPS, never include query params.

```html
<link rel="canonical" href="https://zodiacid.com/pricing/">
```

- EN pages: `https://zodiacid.com/{page}/`
- RU pages: `https://zodiacid.com/ru/{page}/`
- ET pages: `https://zodiacid.com/et/{page}/`
- Homepage: `https://zodiacid.com/` | `https://zodiacid.com/ru/` | `https://zodiacid.com/et/`
- 404.html: NO canonical (it's an error page)

##### 1.3 Hreflang Tags

All 3 language versions present on every page, including self-reference. EN = x-default.

```html
<!-- On zodiacid.com/pricing/ -->
<link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://zodiacid.com/pricing/">
<link rel="alternate" hreflang="ru" href="https://zodiacid.com/ru/pricing/">
<link rel="alternate" hreflang="et" href="https://zodiacid.com/et/pricing/">
<link rel="alternate" hreflang="x-default" href="https://zodiacid.com/pricing/">

<!-- On zodiacid.com/ru/pricing/ — SAME set, identical URLs -->
<link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://zodiacid.com/pricing/">
<link rel="alternate" hreflang="ru" href="https://zodiacid.com/ru/pricing/">
<link rel="alternate" hreflang="et" href="https://zodiacid.com/et/pricing/">
<link rel="alternate" hreflang="x-default" href="https://zodiacid.com/pricing/">
```

Rules:
- Bidirectional (if A points to B, B must point back to A)
- x-default = EN at root
- ISO 639-1 codes only: `en`, `ru`, `et` (no region codes like `en-US`)
- Every page in every language has ALL hreflang tags including self
- 404.html: NO hreflang tags

##### 1.4 HTML Lang Attribute

```html
<html lang="en">   <!-- Root EN pages -->
<html lang="ru">   <!-- /ru/ pages -->
<html lang="et">   <!-- /et/ pages -->
```

##### 1.5 Charset and Viewport

```html
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
```

UTF-8 is critical for Estonian (a, o, u, o) and Russian (Cyrillic).

#### 3. Schema Markup (JSON-LD)

##### 3.1 Schema Status (as of March 2026)

**Rich results fully supported:**
- Product + Offer (product pages) — stars, price, availability in SERPs
- BreadcrumbList (all pages) — breadcrumb trail in SERPs
- Organization (sitewide) — Knowledge Panel, brand entity
- WebSite (homepage) — sitelinks
- Article (content pages) — date, author, headline in SERPs

**Restricted but still useful for AI Overviews:**
- FAQPage — rich results restricted to authoritative govt/health sites since Aug 2023. Still useful for AI systems and Google's internal understanding. Keep using it.
- HowTo — visual rich results removed Sept 2023. Don't add new ones.

**Do NOT use until criteria met:**
- AggregateRating — requires real, verifiable reviews. Fake reviews = Google manual action.
- Review — same as above.

##### 5.4 CF Pages Headers (_headers file)

Create `_headers` in site root:

```
/*
  X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff
  Referrer-Policy: strict-origin-when-cross-origin
  Permissions-Policy: camera=(), microphone=(), geolocation=()

/css/*
  Cache-Control: public, max-age=31536000, immutable

/js/*
  Cache-Control: public, max-age=31536000, immutable

/images/*
  Cache-Control: public, max-age=31536000, immutable

/*.html
  Cache-Control: public, max-age=3600, must-revalidate

/ru/*.html
  Cache-Control: public, max-age=3600, must-revalidate

/et/*.html
  Cache-Control: public, max-age=3600, must-revalidate
```

##### 5.5 Core Web Vitals

Thresholds:
- LCP (Largest Contentful Paint): < 2.5s
- INP (Interaction to Next Paint): < 200ms
- CLS (Cumulative Layout Shift): < 0.1

Static HTML on CF CDN should pass easily. Watch for:
- Unoptimized images — use WebP + `<picture>` fallback (already done on product pages)
- Render-blocking JS — `defer` non-critical scripts (main.js already deferred on sample pages, not on others)
- Font loading flash — use `font-display: swap` (Google Fonts handles this via `&display=swap`)
- CLS from late-loading elements — always set `width` and `height` on images

```html
<!-- Above fold: eager, high priority -->
<img src="hero.webp" alt="..." width="800" height="450" loading="eager" fetchpriority="high">

<!-- Below fold: lazy -->
<img src="chart.webp" alt="..." width="600" height="400" loading="lazy">
```

##### 5.6 Internal Linking

Within a language version, ALL internal links stay in that language:
- `/ru/pricing/` links to `/ru/product-natal/` (never to `/product-natal/`)
- Root EN pages link to other root pages (no prefix)
- Language switcher is the ONLY cross-language link

Language switcher — plain `<a>` tags, no JS:
```html
<!-- On /ru/pricing/ -->
<nav class="lang-switcher" aria-label="Language">
  <a href="/pricing/" hreflang="en" lang="en">English</a>
  <span class="active" aria-current="true">Русский</span>
  <a href="/et/pricing/" hreflang="et" lang="et">Eesti</a>
</nav>

<!-- On /pricing/ (EN root) -->
<nav class="lang-switcher" aria-label="Language">
  <span class="active" aria-current="true">English</span>
  <a href="/ru/pricing/" hreflang="ru" lang="ru">Русский</a>
  <a href="/et/pricing/" hreflang="et" lang="et">Eesti</a>
</nav>
```

#### 6. Content SEO

##### 6.1 Heading Hierarchy

One H1 per page. No skipping levels.

```
H1: Primary keyword (one per page)
  H2: Major sections
    H3: Subsections
```

##### 6.2 Image SEO

```html
<!-- Good: descriptive, specific -->
<img alt="Beyonce natal chart wheel showing Virgo Sun and Scorpio Moon">
<img alt="Brad Pitt and Angelina Jolie synastry biwheel — Sagittarius Sun and Gemini Sun relationship chart">

<!-- Bad: keyword stuffed -->
<img alt="chart image zodiac astrology horoscope natal">

<!-- Decorative only -->
<img alt="" aria-hidden="true">
```

All images MUST have `alt`, `width`, `height` attributes.
Use `aria-hidden="true"` for purely decorative images (like the 404 background wheel).

##### 6.3 Content Freshness

- `datePublished` in Article schema: set once, never change
- `dateModified`: update when content meaningfully changes
- `lastmod` in sitemap: actual last modification date

##### 6.4 AI Overview Optimization

1. Clear, direct opening sentences answering the query. No preamble.
2. Semantic HTML (H2/H3 matching common search queries).
3. Specific data: planetary positions, degree numbers, exact counts (20 celestial bodies, 50+ aspects).
4. `sameAs` Wikidata links in schema — helps AI disambiguate entities.
5. Short paragraphs (2-3 sentences). AI extracts paragraph-level chunks.
6. Never mention "AI" in public content or meta tags.

##### 6.5 Entertainment Disclaimer

Every page footer currently has: "For entertainment and self-reflection purposes only. Not a substitute for professional, medical, legal, or financial advice."

This MUST be present on every page across all languages. Translate natively for RU/ET.

Usage: `"sameAs": "https://www.wikidata.org/wiki/Q2643488"` in `about` blocks.

#### 8. I18N SEO Rules

##### 8.1 Architecture

- EN = root (zodiacid.com/*)
- RU = subdirectory (zodiacid.com/ru/*)
- ET = subdirectory (zodiacid.com/et/*)
- Same filenames across all languages
- Each language is a complete, standalone set of HTML files

##### 8.2 Per-Language Content Rules

- ALL visible text in page language — zero mixing
- RU/ET content is written natively, NOT translated from English
- Brand name "ZodiacID" stays in Latin everywhere
- Prices always in EUR with "EUR" prefix (not $ or the euro sign in different formats)

##### 8.3 Per-Language Schema Rules

- Every JSON-LD block must have `"inLanguage": "{lang}"` where applicable
- All text fields (name, description, question, answer) in page language
- URLs point to the language-specific page
- `sameAs` Wikidata links stay identical (language-neutral)
- BreadcrumbList: translate `name` values, use localized URLs

##### 8.4 Per-Language Meta Rules

- `<html lang="{lang}">` matches content language
- `<title>` in page language
- `<meta name="description">` in page language
- All OG title/description in page language
- `og:locale` matches: `en_US`, `ru_RU`, `et_EE`
- `og:url` points to the localized URL

#### 9. SEO Validation Checklist

##### Pre-Launch (every new page or language version)

**Structure:**
- [ ] Unique `<title>` (no duplicates across entire site including all languages)
- [ ] Unique `<meta name="description">`
- [ ] Self-referencing `<link rel="canonical">`
- [ ] `<meta name="robots">` present
- [ ] Correct `<html lang="">` attribute
- [ ] Semantic H1 > H2 > H3 hierarchy, one H1 per page

**Hreflang:**
- [ ] All 4 hreflang tags present (en, ru, et, x-default)
- [ ] Tags are bidirectional across all 3 language versions
- [ ] x-default points to EN root version
- [ ] URLs in hreflang match actual file paths

**Schema:**
- [ ] JSON-LD validates in Google Rich Results Test
- [ ] Product schema has all fields (price, availability, returnPolicy, deliveryLeadTime)
- [ ] Article schema has datePublished, inLanguage, author, publisher with logo
- [ ] FAQPage schema matches visible FAQ content exactly
- [ ] `inLanguage` present on all content schemas
- [ ] No schema on 404.html

**Open Graph:**
- [ ] og:title, og:description in page language
- [ ] og:image with absolute URL
- [ ] og:url matches canonical
- [ ] og:site_name = "ZodiacID"
- [ ] og:locale matches page language
- [ ] Test: paste URL in Telegram — correct language title/description shown

**Technical:**
- [ ] sitemap.xml includes all public pages with hreflang
- [ ] robots.txt allows crawling of all public pages
- [ ] No mixed content (HTTP on HTTPS)
- [ ] 404.html returns 404 status code (not 200)
- [ ] All images have `alt`, `width`, `height`
- [ ] No orphan pages (every page reachable via internal link)
- [ ] Core Web Vitals pass (PageSpeed Insights)

**I18N:**
- [ ] All internal links within RU pages point to /ru/ paths
- [ ] All internal links within ET pages point to /et/ paths
- [ ] EN internal links use root paths (no prefix)
- [ ] Language switcher links to correct equivalent page
- [ ] No English text visible on RU/ET pages (except brand name)
- [ ] Product prices match across all languages
- [ ] Disclaimer in footer translated for each language

##### Post-Launch (weekly for 4 weeks)

- [ ] Google Search Console: no crawl errors
- [ ] Google Search Console: pages indexed vs submitted per language
- [ ] Google Search Console: no manual actions
- [ ] Hreflang audit (Screaming Frog or Ahrefs)

##### Monthly

- [ ] Schema validation after content updates
- [ ] Dead link check
- [ ] Verify RU/ET pages indexed (`site:zodiacid.com/ru/`, `site:zodiacid.com/et/`)
- [ ] `priceValidUntil` in Product schema not expired

### Risks

1. Bad translations = worse than no translation. Native speakers must QA.
2. Celebrity birth time disputes — some celebs have unverified times.
3. Russian language on EU site may attract sanctioned-jurisdiction traffic. Payment processor handles geo-blocking.
4. 3x maintenance burden — every content change needs 3 files updated.
5. Celebrity samples could be seen as endorsement — use "sample analysis" framing.

### Kill Criteria

1. EN landing page isn't live yet -> ship EN first. (Currently live — proceed.)
2. No validated birth data for 2+ celebrities in any language -> reduce that language's scope.
3. Total site size exceeds CF Pages free tier limits.

## Phase 1: Приземление

**Status:** not_started

### Diagnostic Steps

1. Read ALL 18 existing HTML pages — extract every visible text string (headings, body copy, CTAs, labels, placeholders, alt text, aria-labels, title attrs, meta descriptions, OG tags, schema.org text).
2. Read main.js — understand what's there (tabs, mobile nav, cookie consent, GA4). Confirm NO i18n logic needed in JS.
3. Read styles.css — check fixed-width elements that break with longer RU text (Russian runs 20-30% longer than English).
4. Check sample.html tab structure — how tabs work, what content is static HTML.
5. Check sample report HTML files — format, structure, size.
6. Map ALL internal links across all pages (every `<a href=` that points to another site page). EN links must stay at root, RU links use `/ru/`, ET links use `/et/`.
7. Map ALL schema.org JSON-LD blocks across all pages. Cross-reference with SEO Specification section 0.1 (schema present vs missing).
8. Check GA4 setup — pageview tracking will automatically capture `/ru/`, `/et/` paths.
9. Check existing `robots.txt`, `sitemap.xml`, verify `site.webmanifest`.

### Celebrity Data Validation

For each candidate celebrity:
1. Search Wikipedia for birth date, birth time, birth city
2. Record source URL
3. Calculate Sun sign from date
4. Note Moon sign / Ascendant if birth time is known
5. Pick final 3 per language based on data availability + cultural relevance

# i18n: Estonian + Russian Landing Page + Celebrity Sample Horoscopes

```
task: i18n-landing
created: 2026-03-01
status: not_started
```

## Spec

### Goal

Add Estonian (ET) and Russian (RU) language versions of zodiacid.com as fully separate static HTML pages — SEO-optimized, crawlable, indexable by Google in each language independently. Fix all existing SEO gaps on EN pages (missing meta robots, og:locale, og:site_name, incomplete schemas). Proper `hreflang` annotations, per-language schema.org JSON-LD, per-language OG/meta tags, multi-language sitemap. Generate culturally relevant celebrity sample horoscopes per language. Minimal JS (same as current site — tabs, mobile nav, cookie consent only). All content baked into HTML.

### Why Now (Decision Principles check)

The landing page IS the revenue instrument. Adding RU/ET expands addressable audience to 3 markets. Estonian market has zero competition. Russian-speaking EU diaspora (Germany, Israel, Baltics, Czech Republic) is large. EN site is live — this is a conversion multiplier, not premature infrastructure.

### Hosting

Cloudflare Pages (static). Repo: `zodiacid/zodiacid.com`, remote `cf`. No build step, no server-side logic, no Workers. Deploy: `git push cf main`. Supports `_redirects` and `_headers` files natively.

### Architecture: EN at Root + Language Subdirectories (SEO-first)

**URL structure** (per ZODIACID_SEO_RULES.md v3.0):
- EN = root (`zodiacid.com/*`) — **NO `/en/` prefix**
- RU = subdirectory (`zodiacid.com/ru/*`)
- ET = subdirectory (`zodiacid.com/et/*`)
- Same filenames across all languages
- Trailing slashes in URLs (CF Pages pretty URLs: `pricing.html` serves at `/pricing/`)

```
sites/zodiacid/
├── index.html                          # EN homepage (root = default)
├── pricing.html
├── sample.html
├── about.html
├── faq.html
├── contact.html
├── product-natal.html
├── product-synastry.html
├── product-parenting.html
├── product-redflag.html
├── privacy.html
├── terms.html
├── refund.html
├── 404.html
├── sample-natal-beyonce.html           # existing
├── sample-natal-taylor-swift.html      # NEW
├── sample-natal-freddie-mercury.html   # NEW
├── sample-synastry-lennon-ono.html     # existing
├── sample-parenting-prince-george.html # existing
├── sample-redflag-pitt-jolie.html      # existing
├── ru/                                 # Russian
│   ├── index.html
│   ├── pricing.html
│   ├── sample.html
│   ├── about.html
│   ├── faq.html
│   ├── contact.html
│   ├── product-natal.html
│   ├── product-synastry.html
│   ├── product-parenting.html
│   ├── product-redflag.html
│   ├── privacy.html
│   ├── terms.html
│   ├── refund.html
│   ├── 404.html
│   ├── sample-natal-tsoi.html
│   ├── sample-natal-pugacheva.html
│   └── sample-natal-vysotsky.html
├── et/                                 # Estonian
│   ├── index.html
│   ├── pricing.html
│   ├── sample.html
│   ├── about.html
│   ├── faq.html
│   ├── contact.html
│   ├── product-natal.html
│   ├── product-synastry.html
│   ├── product-parenting.html
│   ├── product-redflag.html
│   ├── privacy.html
│   ├── terms.html
│   ├── refund.html
│   ├── 404.html
│   ├── sample-natal-part.html
│   ├── sample-natal-ots.html
│   └── sample-natal-meri.html
├── css/styles.css                      # Shared (one copy)

├── images/                             # Shared assets
